definition: Unique identifier assigned to each customer order placed through the platform.
The primary email address associated with a customer's account, used for order notifications and account management.
Stock Keeping Unit — a unique alphanumeric code assigned to each product variant for inventory tracking.
The total monetary value charged to the customer for a transaction, inclusive of taxes and fees.
The date on which an order is dispatched from the fulfillment center to the carrier.
An alphanumeric promotional code applied by a customer to receive a price reduction on their order.
The customer-provided explanation for returning a product, used to categorize and analyze return trends.
The current fulfillment state of an order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled).
Unique identifier assigned to each customer account in the CRM system.
The final monetary amount charged to the customer for a completed order, inclusive of taxes and discounts.
The customer's registered address used for payment verification and invoicing.
The destination address to which an order is delivered.
A hierarchical classification used to group products of the same type within the catalog.
The financial instrument or service used by a customer to complete a transaction (e.g., credit card, PayPal, bank transfer).
The monetary value returned to the customer following a return or cancellation.
